prose.h: Why can’t you view someone else’s future?
prose.p: Third-party trajectories involve privacy that can’t be consented to and consent chains that can’t be verified. We use identity binding plus topic classifiers: even if you say you only want a partner’s career arc, if the object is another person, the session stops. The upside—you’re forced back to your own levers of action, which is the point of the service.

Ten years balances explainability, psychological impact, and regulatory caution. Further horizons collapse toward indistinguishable noise while amplifying existential anxiety. Inside ten years, outputs can still align with mid-term plans—school, career, family cadence—and debrief into action.

You experience forward imagery, not physical travel to another timeline. You can’t touch or change what you see—this blocks impulsive “bet everything on one vision” decisions. Real change happens after the session, in the next-step list you co-write with your guide.

spec.title: Clause summary (aligned with the booking agreement)
spec.lead: These clauses protect ethics and safety for everyone. Booking means you’ve read and understood them.

articles.p: The service supports viewing only; you can’t touch what you see or change the future inside the session. Images are representations, not objects you can act on.
Observation is strictly limited to your personal development path—school admissions, career, self-growth. It must not and cannot be used to spy on or steer other people’s lives.
Scenes may not extend beyond ten years from now. Each session is strictly 10–20 minutes.
Afterward you return with a clearer reference and adjust your path in the present—that’s the design intent.

rules.footnote: Next: read FAQ and Privacy on this site.

stepsIntro.title: Four steps, one observation
stepsIntro.lead: From intake to debrief, a certified guide stays with you. Bring your question; leave with a path map.

steps.p: Submit intent and the compliance questionnaire; we confirm your goal is within the allowed “personal trajectory” scope.
Align on timing, expectations, and contraindications; sign consent and privacy agreements.

At the confirmed site you enter a private sleeping pod, don the calibrated head interface and VR headset: encrypted signals route to our isolated systems while you view your own forward trajectory. 10–20 minutes, view only—no touching, no changing what you see.
Structured review of what emerged and actionable adjustments for now (not medical or investment advice).

prose.p: Every booking is topic-classified and identity-bound—system and human checks that your question is about your own development, not third-party curiosity. If the boundary is fuzzy, we decline or ask you to reframe—so you don’t enter observation in an unsafe frame.

Each venue offers a dedicated sleeping pod: light-tight, acoustically damped, and reserved for one client at a time. A fitted head interface acquires the minimal biological and neural correlates needed to align your trajectory model; transmission is end-to-end encrypted, confined to our confidential compute enclave, and never used for ads or resale. You then wear a sealed VR display that renders the observation—your guide stays in an adjacent protocol room with safety and compliance telemetry only, not the visual stream itself. No surveillance camera is aimed at your face (door and safety-corridor compliance recording only, where required). City-specific notes ship with your confirmation.

timeline.title: From now to +10 years
timeline.lead: As you move along the axis, noise settles and readability rises—a metaphor for confidence in your personal trajectory, not prophecy.
blurbs: Your next chapter is still out of focus.
Noise is settling; contours become readable.
Mid-horizon choice points start to appear.
Far imagery stays thin, but direction vectors emerge.
At the ten-year cap: structural self-narrative only—not granular fortune-telling.

faqItems.q: Will what I see come true?
faqItems.a: No. You see model-conditioned forward imagery for reflection and planning—not a promise or prediction.

faqItems.q: How long from booking to session?
faqItems.a: Compliance review is typically 3–5 business days; scheduling depends on city and guide load. Rush lanes are for advanced and enterprise tiers.
Yes. Trial · Pulse is free, capped at one minute of observation after a brief ethics check—no debrief document. Paid sessions stay 10–20 minutes per plan.
Full refund up to 48 hours before the session starts; after start or final consent, only as the agreement allows.

faqItems.q: Do you keep or upload my observation content?
faqItems.a: By default we keep redacted compliance logs only. If you want a personal debrief pack, encrypted offline delivery is available—see Privacy.
Under 18 requires guardian presence through the full compliance flow; themes must still be limited to the minor’s own developmental path.

faq.footnote: Concept presentation. This is not medical, legal, or investment advice.

prose.p: Trial “Pulse”: a free, capped one-minute observation slice so you can feel the format and UI rhythm before committing (eligibility and daily slots apply). Intro “First light”: one 10–20 minute observation plus a standard debrief summary. Advanced “Trajectory”: two sessions (≥90 days apart), a dedicated guide, and 90 days of async Q&A. Enterprise “Institution”: schools and companies—custom compliance and on-site guides per contract.

The trial is not a substitute for a full session: no debrief pack and a hard 1-minute cap on observation time. Paid tiers include compliance review; intro excludes a dedicated guide and encrypted archive async channel; advanced adds path templates and longer follow-up; enterprise adds SLA and bulk audit hooks per contract.
Groups should request a custom quote so we can align compliance and staffing. Billing per your order confirmation.

legalProse.p: Shì Wèi offers forward-looking experiential planning support—not medical care, therapy, legal advice, or investment advice. You own decisions made after sessions.
You won’t use the service to spy on or steer third parties. Themes are limited to your own developmental path; duration and horizon follow the agreement and on-site disclosure.
Prices follow your order. Full refund up to 48 hours before the session unless otherwise agreed in writing.
To the fullest extent allowed by law, we’re not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages from using or being unable to use the service.
For terms questions, use the site contact flow.

terms.footnote: Last updated March 2026. Have counsel review before production use.

legalProse.p: May include identity and contact details, booking and payment data, compliance questionnaire answers, and voluntary notes from debrief (encrypted offline delivery stays on media you hold, if selected).
To deliver the service, security audit, improve the product, and meet legal duties. We don’t sell identifiable observation content to ad networks.
Encryption in transit and tiered access. By default we retain redacted compliance logs; personal summary retention follows your order agreement.
Where law allows, you may request access, correction, deletion, or restriction—via our contact channels.
Under 18 requires guardian consent and presence; we only process what’s necessary for the minor’s own use.

privacy.footnote: Last updated March 2026. Align with your real processing practices.

legalProse.p: We come from university ethics labs, service design, and cognitive science. In one interdisciplinary workshop we saw that many people don’t need to be told an answer—they need a bounded encounter with a plausible future self. Shì Wèi exists to offer a time-boxed, ethical, reviewable foresight experience—not to sell fate.

Person-first: only your trajectory, with technical isolation from third-party curiosity. Transparency-first: what we won’t do matters as much as what we will. Present-first: every session ends in action you can take now.

We treat the future as a constrained path in a high-dimensional state space, not a single point. Observation projects only onto your observable sub-manifold—a controlled Bayesian update on self-relevant beliefs. Third-party dimensions are hard-truncated in the math, not left to good intentions.

Prospective imagery couples measurably with working and episodic memory. Our facilitation aligns dual-system regulation: less amygdala-driven threat fantasy, stronger encoding of executable next steps. We’re reallocating attention, not rewriting destiny.

Technical: identity binding, topic classifiers, session sandboxes. Process: certified guides, dual-signed consent, abort protocols. Governance: quarterly ethics review, external counsel sign-off, user appeals.

User-facing probability language traces to discrete decision logs; we avoid unfalsifiable rhetoric. When science or regulation shifts, model versions migrate; legacy retains redacted statistics only—no identifiable session detail.

about.footnote: Continue to Team and Services via the site nav.

legalProse.p: Observation happens only at a Shì Wèi–designated location you receive after clearance. You recline in a private sleeping pod engineered for stillness and sensory control. A head-mounted interface securely acquires and transmits—confidentially and in encrypted form—the signal bundle our systems need to project your personal trajectory; nothing leaves the session path without encryption, and raw streams are purged per our data policy after synthesis. You then wear a VR headset to experience the forward imagery yourself: structured, horizon-bounded, and observe-only. Staff never watch what you see; they monitor session health and abort lines only.

Optional Trial · Pulse: free, one-minute observation slice after a brief ethics gate—no debrief pack. Paid: pre-session compliance summary and window recommendation; one controlled 10–20 minute observation; structured debrief notes (optional encrypted offline pack); advanced tiers add path templates and async Q&A allowance.
Ethics-board-reviewed scripts, non-medical biofeedback aids for calm, and redacted logging. Implementation details are confidential; data flows and retention are explained during consult.
Spying on others or fortune-telling claims; medical, legal, or investment advice; any guarantee that imagery will come true.

services.footnote: For bespoke work, use Contact or the booking entry point.

We aim to reply within one business day for general inquiries; enterprise diligence follows project scope.
